reason: No active canonical frontier_research item existed; this additive update records the completed research slice without overwriting shared queue state.

proposed_item.action: Evaluate experimental browser playback-path statistics without confusing telemetry with audibility proof.

progress.finding: AudioPlaybackStats can supplement render-position evidence with playback duration, underrun, and latency telemetry in supporting browsers, but remains experimental, privacy-gated, non-universal, and insufficient to prove audibility.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-equivalent pre-commit files.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should use the evaluator only under feature detection and must preserve independent render-position plus physical-device audibility evidence.
